title: Managing Mannequins - Fill Your World With Life!
description: Adds mannequins in survival mode! Change their look and give them movement!
body:
Adds the ability to create custom mannequins! Simply rename an armor stand to "Mannequin" and place it and voila! Then you can Right Click on it to change various settings about the mannequin, such as its texture (you can copy your own texture!), armor, or pose! You can also record your own movements to the mannequin and play them back a little like Replay Mod!
Some suggested uses: try out different armor trims with your skin to see which you like the best or record yourself running around your base and set the mannequin to play the recording to give your base an extra lively feeling!
